_doc: Expected input format for the Error Discovery pipeline. This is a tau2-bench-style results JSON. Replace the example values with your own data.

tasks._doc: A task object. 'id' is required for alignment with simulations. All other fields are passed verbatim to the LLM as ground truth context.
tasks.instruction: The user wants to cancel their economy-class flight reservation ABCD12.

simulations._doc: A simulation object. 'task_id' must match a task 'id'. 'trial' is the repeat index. 'reward' is the scalar outcome score (0–1).

reward_info.details: Agent cancelled the correct reservation but failed to confirm the refund amount.

messages.content: Hi, I need to cancel my flight reservation ABCD12.
I have retrieved your reservation. I will now cancel it.
Your reservation ABCD12 has been cancelled.
